pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.subtitle: Track what you have on hand
pantry.emptyDefault: No pantry items yet. Add items manually or scan receipts to populate your pantry.
pantry.emptyRunningLow: Nothing running low. Items appear here when quantity drops to your low-stock threshold.
pantry.emptyExpiring: Nothing expiring soon. Items appear here when they are within 3 days of your expiry setting.

stores.title: Stores
stores.lead: Favorite stores appear first. Tap a store to view receipts. Removing a store hides it from this list but keeps receipt history.
stores.emptyBody: Add a store manually or scan a receipt to register one automatically.

compare.subtitle: Find the best deals across stores before you buy.

signup.headline: Save money on
signup.subheadline: Smart grocery budgeting, price comparison, and lists — all in one place.

signin.heading: Welcome back
signin.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.
signin.errorInvalidOrNew: Incorrect email or password — or you may not have an email account yet.
signin.oauthOnlyHint: This account uses {{provider}} sign-in, not a password.
signin.oauthOnlyAction: Use the button below to sign in with Google.

signup.heading: Create your account
signup.subheading: Start saving money on every shop.
signup.name: Name
signup.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
signup.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.errorPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successTitleGeneric: Check your email if you have an account
forgotPassword.successBodySent: We sent a reset link to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.successBodyGeneric: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.successHints: Check spam or Promotions. Wait 2–5 minutes. Password reset only works if you signed up with email — use Continue with Google if you used Google instead.
forgotPassword.oauthOnlyBody: This account uses {{provider}} sign-in, not a password. Tap "{{provider}}" on the sign-in screen, or set a password from Settings after signing in with {{provider}}.
forgotPassword.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

paywall.title: Choose your plan
paywall.headline: Save money every time you shop.
paywall.subhead: Track prices, catch drops, and see where your money actually goes.
paywall.outcomeSubtitle: Turn receipts into real savings — not guesswork.

save.title: Stop overpaying
save.body: Compare prices across stores and build the cheapest cart.

track.title: Know your true spend
track.body: Full price history and monthly spending breakdowns.

alerts.title: Catch deals automatically
alerts.body: Smart sale alerts when tracked items drop.

paywall.trialSubtext: Full Pro access for 7 days. No payment required.
paywall.familySubtitle: One subscription for your household. Invite members free.

billingDisclaimer.stripe: Secure checkout powered by Stripe. Manage or cancel anytime from your subscription settings.
billingDisclaimer.revenuecat: Subscriptions are billed through the App Store or Google Play. Manage or cancel in your device subscription settings.
billingDisclaimer.mock: Dev mock billing — no payment processed. Subscription is stored locally on this device.
billingDisclaimer.webUnconfigured: Web billing is not configured yet. Add Stripe env vars on Vercel or use mock mode locally.
billingDisclaimer.nativeUnconfigured: In-app purchases are not configured yet. Set RevenueCat API keys for native builds.

pro.smartAlerts: Smart sale alerts for tracked items
pro.adFree: Ad-free experience (when ads are shown on Free)

settings.title: Settings
settings.displayNameHint: Used in your home screen greeting
settings.householdHint: Personal and household data stay separate. Family members join free — one payer funds the workspace.
settings.openLastListHint: Resume the shopping list you viewed last
settings.scanningInfo: Receipts are scanned automatically. Scanning usually takes 15–45 seconds; long receipts can take up to 2 minutes. Every scan opens for review before it's saved.
settings.themeHint: Personalize Penny Pantry with Pro themes
settings.themeLocked: Upgrade to Pro to unlock custom themes
settings.fontHint: System font is free; Pro unlocks custom typefaces
settings.fontLocked: Upgrade to Pro to unlock custom fonts
settings.avatarHint: Pick a character for your home greeting (Pro)
settings.avatarLocked: Upgrade to Pro to unlock custom avatars
settings.languageHint: Changes the language across the app
settings.trackAlertsSub: Watch items and set target-price alerts
settings.signedIn: Signed in with your Penny Pantry account.
settings.deleteGuestHint: Remove all receipts, lists, and preferences stored on this device.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Permanently delete your cloud account and clear local app data.
settings.shareAppSub: Tell friends about smart grocery savings
settings.shareMessage: Save money on every shop with Penny Pantry — smart budgeting, price comparison, and grocery lists. https://pennypantry.xyz
settings.changeEmailHint: We'll send a confirmation link to your new address. Your current email stays active until you confirm.
settings.changeEmailPending: Check {{email}} for a confirmation link to finish updating your email.
settings.changeEmailFailed: Could not update email. Please try again.

pennyGreen.name: Penny Green
pennyGreen.description: Classic brand look — clean white with fresh green accents.

midnightSlate.name: Midnight Slate
midnightSlate.description: Dark navy with teal highlights for a premium, focused feel.

sunriseCoral.name: Sunrise Coral
sunriseCoral.description: Warm cream tones with a vibrant coral accent.

oceanBlue.name: Ocean Blue
oceanBlue.description: Cool, calm whites paired with deep ocean blue.

lavenderPro.name: Lavender Pro
lavenderPro.description: Soft purple palette with rich violet accents.

rubyRed.name: Ruby Red
rubyRed.description: Cream white with bold red accents — premium and confident.

lora.name: Lora
lora.description: Elegant serif for a refined look.

hero.title: Your whole household, one workspace
hero.subtitle: Share shopping lists with family or roommates. Members join free — one Family subscription funds the household.

freeHero.title: Shop solo on Free
freeHero.subtitle: Your basic grocery list works great for one person. Subscribe to Family workspace to share lists and sync with your household.

step1.title: Get your family code
step1.body: Every household gets a unique code. Share it with your spouse or kids so they can join.

step2.title: Share a shopping list
step2.body: When your list is ready, tap Share with family to send it to everyone.

step3.title: They add it on their phone
step3.body: Family members paste the invite you sent and choose to merge or start a new list.

sync.title: Stay in sync automatically
sync.body: With an active Family workspace, everyone sees list updates without copying and pasting each time.

familyCode.title: Your family code
familyCode.hintUnlocked: Available with Family workspace — share lists with your household.
familyCode.hintLocked: Subscribe to Family workspace — invite members free.
familyCode.tapToUnlock: Tap to unlock with Family workspace

shareList.title: Share a shopping list
shareList.hint: Send your active list to family members so they can shop from the same plan.

sync.title: Multi-user sync
sync.hintActive: Lists update across every family member's phone — no copy and paste needed.
sync.supabaseHint: Live sync needs Supabase configured (EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL). Copy/paste sharing still works.
sync.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Family workspace for automatic sync — everyone sees the same list.

receive.title: Receive a shared list
receive.hint: Paste the invite link or code a family member sent you.
receive.placeholder: Paste invite link or code from family member…

compare.title: What you get with Family workspace
compare.item1: • Shared lists & live sync for your household
compare.item2: • Invite members free — no Pro required

noLists.title: No lists yet
noLists.message: Create a shopping list first, then share it with your family.

shareFailed.title: Share failed
shareFailed.buildMessage: Could not build your list for sharing. Try again.
shareFailed.genericMessage: Could not share your list. Try again.

shareSuccess.title: Shared with family
shareSuccess.syncedMessage: Your list is live for your household — invite link copied to the share sheet.
shareSuccess.upgradeMessage: List shared via invite link. Upgrade to Pro for automatic sync.
shareSuccess.supabaseMessage: List shared via invite link. Connect Supabase for live sync across devices.

couldNotReadInvite.title: Couldn't read invite
couldNotReadInvite.message: Paste a family code, invite link, or the full list JSON your family member sent.
couldNotReadInvite.fallbackMessage: Paste the invite link or code your family member sent.

syncComplete.title: Sync complete
syncComplete.updated_one: Updated {{count}} shared list across your household.
syncComplete.updated_other: Updated {{count}} shared lists across your household.
syncComplete.upToDate: Everything is already up to date.

inviteCopied.title: Invite copied
inviteCopied.message: Send this to family members so they can join and receive your lists.
